topTargets.name: Makai Lemon
topTargets.reasoning: RSP WR3 (DoT 88.8, Starter grade with Amon-Ra St. Brown comp) and ADP 11.18 lines up perfectly at 1.07. Top-3 board players (Tate, Love, Lemon by RSP) are unlikely to all reach 1.07, but Lemon is the most plausible elite WR to fall and fits a roster already deep at WR (7) by adding genuine ceiling.

topTargets.name: Malachi Fields
topTargets.reasoning: RSP WR4 (DoT 87.2, Nico Collins comp, Starter grade). Size/speed profile that the medium-RSP-affinity GM can blend with consensus. Likely available at 1.07 if a QB or RB run starts ahead.

topTargets.name: Fernando Mendoza
topTargets.reasoning: RSP QB1 (DoT 85.6) and ADP 11.39 — sits right at this slot. Roster has only 2 QBs with 6 contracts expiring, so dynasty QB anchor is on the table. Cap-tight ($4.1M space) makes a long-term QB1 attractive vs. paying veteran QB.

topTargets.name: KC Concepcion
topTargets.reasoning: RSP WR5 (DoT 86.3, Starter grade, first-round value per Waldman) and ADP 13.57. Plausible 1.07 pivot if Lemon/Fields are gone, and a medium-affinity GM can justify by citing both RSP and consensus alignment.

topTargets.name: Jadarian Price
topTargets.reasoning: Realistic 2.17 target — RSP RB6 (DoT 83.5, Rotational Starter, ceiling as high as RBs 2-5 per Waldman) and ADP 16.05. Roster has 5 RBs but no clear high-ceiling young back; Price's pre-draft media bump as Love's backfield mate could push him into reach territory at 2.17.

capPosture: Tight at $40.9M used / $4.1M space — rookies almost certainly need to start on taxi (50% cap hit) to stay legal, especially if 1.07 lands a top-tier salary.

wildcard.name: Eli Stowers
wildcard.reasoning: RSP TE1 in this group (DoT 84.4, classic move TE on cusp of Starter tier). Roster has 4 TEs but no young anchor; medium-affinity GM blending RSP could reach for him at 2.17 over a consensus WR if a TE run starts.

summary: The Mariachi Ninjas enter the draft cap-tight ($4.1M space) with a balanced roster and 6 expiring contracts, so the play at 1.07 is best-WR-available — Lemon if he falls, otherwise Fields or a Mendoza pivot for long-term QB stability. Medium RSP affinity means the GM blends Waldman's board with MFL ADP rather than reaching purely on DoT score, so expect a name where both boards align. At 2.17, Price or Stowers are taxi-bound lottery tickets that fit the cap reality.
